title: lasianthus obliquus
intro: Lasianthus obliquus is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the tea shrub. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine, exhibiting antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lasianthus obliquus include potential anti-cancer and cardiovascular protective effects, as well as immune system support and antioxidant activity. The leaves can be prepared as a tea or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
